generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor in building infrastructure for ambient temperature monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSystemStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor for monitoring lighting system operational state in building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingSystemStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSystem : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system actuator controlled via on/off state, brightness, and color temperature parameters"
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data transmitted via 1-second heartbeat mechanism"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingSystemStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    base:desc "Lighting system state data (on/off, brightness, color temperature) transmitted via WebSocket"
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSystemStateSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured temperature data processed from sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance LightingSystemStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured lighting system state data processed from sensor readings"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingSystemStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based geometric model in Revit and IFC format with semantic annotations including Instance General UUIDs and IFC types"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDEFrameworks
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity with resilient at-least-once message delivery"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedControlLogicService
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management with policy-based validation of value ranges and units"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, AutomatedControlLogicService
]

instance EclipseBasyx : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Basyx open-source Industry 4.0 platform for digital twin integration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ResourceOptimizationService
]

instance BentleyItwinJs : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Bentley Systems' itwin.js for infrastructure digital twin applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables InteractiveVisualizationService
]

instance MDEFrameworks : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering frameworks automating BIM model transformation into deployable DT artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService, ResourceOptimizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring service for live data synchronization via Eclipse Hono and Ditto"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance InteractiveVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization service for immersive system state oversight and control using UE5"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpatialFilteringInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics service for fault detection and maintenance planning"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalDecisionSupportInsight
]

instance ResourceOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Resource optimization service for energy efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides ResourceOptimizationInsight
]

instance AutomatedControlLogicService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Automated control logic execution service for device control with pre-execution safety checks"
    DTDFVocab:provides TurnOnLightingAction, SetBrightnessAction, SetColorTemperatureAction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for real-time monitoring of building systems"
]

instance SpatialFilteringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for spatial filtering by building storey in visualization"
]

instance OperationalDecisionSupportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for operational decision-making supported by custom analytics services"
]

instance ResourceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight for energy efficiency optimization"
]

instance TurnOnLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to turn on lighting system with safety constraints enforcement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SetBrightnessAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set lighting system brightness level with value range validation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SetColorTemperatureAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to set lighting system color temperature in Kelvin with unit validation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure environment containing all physical and virtual components"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightingSystemStateSensor, LightingSystem
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands are initiated from the digital twin via WebSocket connections to Eclipse Ditto, routed through Eclipse Hono to physical devices, with confirmation of execution required before updating the digital twin's state (e.g., switch state), ensuring bidirectional synchronization."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system utilizes a 1-second heartbeat mechanism for real-time synchronization between physical assets and the digital twin, with a timeliness score of 0.997. Data exchange is managed via Eclipse Hono and Ditto, ensuring continuous updates with minimal latency."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The framework employs a central hub architecture coordinating roles: Building Control Engineers (device modeling and deployment initiation), Facility Managers (real-time monitoring and control), and DT Engineers (service integration). Model-driven engineering (MDE) transforms enriched BIM models into deployable artifacts, while Eclipse Hono and Ditto enable bidirectional data exchange. The modular architecture supports scalable, service-oriented development through standardized extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses requirements elicitation, BIM modeling using Autodesk Revit with custom families and property sets for device metadata, IFC export and model checking (e.g., Instance General UUID validation), automated deployment via model-driven transformation pipeline, runtime operation with real-time data synchronization using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, and evolution through modular service integration. Roles include Building Control Engineers for initial modeling, Facility Managers for monitoring/control, and DT Engineers for extending functionality."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is validated through the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric (Timeliness=0.997, Reliability=1.0, Availability=1.0), measured over 12-minute intervals with 1-second heartbeat synchronization. Validation includes IFC-based model checking for metadata (e.g., UUID presence), Ditto policy enforcement for data ranges, and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is ensured by Hono's message persistence and Ditto's event storage, maintaining synchronization integrity with no observable divergence during testing."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical network infrastructure utilizes Eclipse Hono for IoT device communication and Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, with HTTP POST and WebSocket protocols for data transfer between the UE5 visualization layer and Ditto. Specifics on network topology, bandwidth, latency, reliability, and security are not detailed in the documents."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with external systems uses Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time bidirectional data synchronization. Standardized data schemas and modular extension points ensure interoperability with Building Control Systems (BCS) and enterprise systems, addressing fragmented data through semantic standardization."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) standard for BIM data exchange, requiring standardized device types (e.g., IFCLIGHTFIXTURETYPE) and Instance General UUIDs. NF1 interoperability ensures compatibility across heterogeneous BIM tools, IoT protocols (Eclipse Hono and Ditto), and visualization systems (UE5)."
]
